message:
🌱 Use org-wide workflows from .github repo (#183)

Remove duplicate caller workflows now provided org-wide from kubestellar/.github:
- add-help-wanted.yml, assignment-helper.yml, feedback.yml, greetings.yml
- pr-verifier.yml, pr-verify-title.yml, scorecard.yml

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Help Wanted Label
-
-on:
-  issues:
-    types: [labeled]
-
-permissions:
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  label:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-add-help-wanted.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit

@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-name: Assignment Helper
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-permissions:
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  assignment-helper:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-assignment-helper.yml@main

@@ -1,14 +0,0 @@
-name: Feedback Wanted
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [closed]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  feedback:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-feedback.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit

@@ -1,17 +0,0 @@
-name: Greetings
-
-on:
-  pull_request_target:
-    types: [opened, reopened]
-  issues:
-    types: [opened, reopened]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  issues: write
-  pull-requests: write
-
-jobs:
-  greet:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-greetings.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit

@@ -1,14 +0,0 @@
-name: PR Verifier
-
-on:
-  pull_request_target:
-    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened]
-
-permissions:
-  checks: write
-  pull-requests: read
-
-jobs:
-  verify:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verifier.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit

@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-name: "PR Title Verifier"
-
-on:
-  pull_request:
-    types: [opened, edited, synchronize, reopened]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-
-jobs:
-  verify:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verify-title.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit

@@ -1,14 +0,0 @@
-name: OpenSSF Scorecard
-
-on:
-  branch_protection_rule:
-  schedule:
-    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'
-  push:
-    branches: [ "main" ]
-  workflow_dispatch:
-
-jobs:
-  analysis:
-    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-scorecard.yml@main
-    secrets: inherit
